{{CargoOrgan
|name=Gaze of the Void
|type=Bionic
|rank=orange
|id=10693
|idx=51
|description=A lifeless stare that induces hallucinations in all who meet it. No matter how powerful the foe, a single glance strips away identity and traps them in eternal recurrence…
|skill=Summon 3 Void Machines, dealing DMG equal to 202% of ATK!
|hp=1810
|def=202
|atk=156
|rush=305
|gene1=Crit DMG +7.5%
|gene2=Per 5 Shrine Flying Objects shot, {race} RUSH +10
Shrine flying objects shot: 100/100
|gene3=RUSH CRIT DMG +7.5%
|gene4=RUSH CRIT DMG +7.5%
|gene5=When enemy life is above 50%, DMG dealt +7.5%
|gene7=Crit DMG +7.5% (Awakened)
|}}
